title: poa angustifolia var. strigosa
intro: Poa angustifolia var. strigosa, also known as the narrow-leaf bluegrass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America, specifically in the western and mountainous regions. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Poa angustifolia var. strigosa are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various ailments, such as colds, fever, and skin conditions.
